revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-625

Crystal drive

An oscillator, the frequency of which is determined by the vibrations of a crystal having piezo-electric properties.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Crystal-oscillator drive}}
